channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: God of War Laufey is coming to the PS5
item.description: Sony ended its big State of Play showcase with a major reveal: the next God of War. The new title is called God of War Laufey, and is once again developed by Sony's Santa Monica studio. Currently,...

item.title: Next.js 16 Caching for E-Commerce: Cache Components, use cache, revalidateTag, and Fresh Product Data
item.description: Caching in e-commerce is never just about speed. A fast storefront is useful only if it still shows the right price, the correct stock level, and the right experience for the current customer....

item.title: Remedy’s Control sequel launches in September
item.description: Control Resonant, the upcoming sequel to Remedy Entertainment's Control, will be released on September 24th, 2026, according to a trailer that premiered during Tuesday's PlayStation State of Play...

item.title: Building My First React Component with TypeScript: A Beginner's Breakdown
item.description: So I just started learning React with TypeScript, and I want to share what I built and — more importantly — what I actually learned from it. If you're also new to this stack, this one's for you....

item.title: SQL Interview Problems for Data Engineers: 30 Patterns That Actually Get Asked
item.description: Data engineering SQL interviews are not the same as software engineering SQL interviews. You will not be asked to find the second-highest salary or reverse a string. You will be asked to...

item.title: Rust, C++, and the Creative Power of Free Software
item.description: C++, a Mother Tongue For a large part of my professional life, C++ has been more than a programming language. It has been a mother tongue. Not in the sentimental sense of the word, but in a deeper...

item.title: Daily Dev Log — Food Blog Platform
item.description: Today I continued improving my Food Blog Platform 🍰 built with Django. The focus today wasn’t on adding massive new features, but on making the existing system cleaner, more stable, and easier to...

item.title: Terraform for Data Engineers: Provisioning GCS, BigQuery, S3, and Lambda Without Clicking Through Consoles
item.description: Every data pipeline eventually needs a bucket. Then a second bucket. Then a BigQuery dataset, a service account with the right permissions, and a Lambda function to handle alerts. If you set all...

item.title: "Todo mundo sabe mais que eu?" Como encarei a síndrome do impostor na faculdade de Computação
item.description: Em 2023, eu arrumei as malas e saí de Recife, minha terra natal, para morar no interior do Mato Grosso. O motivo? Cursar Ciência da Computação. Eu sabia que enfrentaria um choque cultural, o calor...

item.title: Escudo
item.description: Privacy-First Personal Finance for iOS Your finances. On your phone. Nowhere else. A privacy-first personal finance app that connects your banks, brokerage, and investment accounts into one...

item.title: Stop Juggling 5 Tools , Python's uv Does It All (And It's Blazing Fast)
item.description: If you've been writing Python for more than a year, you know the ritual. A new project. A fresh terminal. And then: pyenv install 3.12.3 pyenv local 3.12.3 python -m venv .venv source...

item.title: Memory Safety, Unsafe Rust Hardening, and Age Verification Security Risks
item.description: Memory Safety, Unsafe Rust Hardening, and Age Verification Security Risks Today's Highlights Today's top security news examines the critical importance of memory safety in software development,...

item.title: Here’s seven bloody minutes of Wolverine on the PS5
item.description: At its big State of Play show on Tuesday, Sony shared new look Marvel's Wolverine, the next big title from Insomniac Games that's launching exclusively on PS5 on September 15th. Dressed in the...

item.title: PlayStation State of Play June 2026: All the news and trailers
item.description: While the majority of Summer Game Fest takes place over the weekend, Sony is getting a jump on things with its next State of Play showcase, which airs on June 2nd at 5PM ET. It’s coming at a...

item.title: I held the next-gen handheld
item.description: Intel couldn't catch a break. Layoffs. Shakedowns. Crashing CPUs torpedoing its reputation, sending desktop gamers fleeing to AMD. Apple and Qualcomm pushing Intel out of multiple flagship...

item.title: Microsoft Build 2026: The 7 biggest announcements
item.description: Microsoft just kicked off Build 2026 with a keynote from CEO Satya Nadella and other company leaders. As expected, it was filled with announcements, ranging from new Surface hardware to an...

item.title: Uber caps employee AI spending after blowing through budget in 4 months
item.description: Uber's cutback has occurred after the company had reportedly encouraged staff to use AI as much as possible.

item.title: New Microsoft tool lets devs spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions
item.description: Microsoft on Tuesday took the wraps off Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open source framework for spinning up AI evaluations.

item.title: Google June 2026 Android Update Patches 124 Flaws, One Actively Exploited
item.description: Google on Monday released patches for 124 security vulnerabilities impacting its Android operating system for the month of June 2026, including one high-severity flaw in the Framework component...

item.title: Trump signs executive order to review AI models before they’re released
item.description: President Donald Trump signed an executive order Tuesday creating a "voluntary framework" for AI companies to share their frontier models with the federal government before they're released "to...

item.title: Gamaredon Exploits WinRAR to Deliver GammaWorm and GammaSteel Against Ukraine
item.description: The Russian hacking group known as Gamaredon has been attributed to the continued exploitation of a WinRAR vulnerability to deliver multiple malware families aimed at data theft and propagation....

item.title: Martin Scorsese becomes the latest — and most unlikely — Hollywood voice for AI
item.description: The caveat is that one of the world's most famous living directors is using the tech solely for storyboarding.

item.title: Microsoft’s next-gen quantum chip cuts timeline to useful quantum computing
item.description: Microsoft claimed last year that it had made a key breakthrough in quantum computing with Majorana 1, the company's first quantum processor. While physicists were immediately skeptical of...

item.title: Oracle WebLogic CVE-2024-21182 Added to KEV Catalog After Active Exploitation
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Monday added a high-severity security flaw impacting Oracle WebLogic Server to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV)...

item.title: Microsoft’s first advanced reasoning AI is here
item.description: Microsoft announced a bunch of new in-house AI models at Build 2026, including a new "flagship" model: MAI-Thinking-1. It's an ambitious step into model development for Microsoft, which introduced...

item.title: The durable, floatable UE Wonderboom 4 speaker is cheaper than ever
item.description: I like the UE Wonderboom 4 Bluetooth speaker so much that I bought two of them, though I wish I could have paid less for them. Fortunately, you can stock up on the cheap, so long as you like the...

item.title: Microsoft launches Scout, an OpenClaw-inspired personal assistant
item.description: Launched at Build, Microsoft Scout is a new AI assistant meant to bring the power and flexibility of OpenClaw into the Microsoft 365 system.

item.title: Google rolls out fake call detection to protect against AI deepfake impersonation scams
item.description: As people increasingly refuse to answer calls from unknown numbers, scammers are shifting their tactics by spoofing trusted phone numbers and using AI deepfake technology to sound like authority...

item.title: Microsoft offers devs a better way to control AI agent behavior
item.description: The specification lets developer, compliance, and security teams define their own policies for agents to follow in portable policy files.

item.title: Meet Microsoft Scout, Your AI Coworker That Never Logs Off
item.description: Microsoft’s OpenClaw-style agent appears in Teams, just like a human colleague, and automates your dull office tasks.
